artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found two Alexandria University central news pages from the Council of Graduate Studies and Research and one official Faculty of Education PDF about AI in scientific research. The general university values page was recorded but rejected for AI-policy claims because it contains academic-integrity language without AI-specific guidance.

artifacts.title: Alexandria University AI Policy Evidence Draft
artifacts.summary: Staged candidate evidence for Alexandria University includes Graduate Studies and Research Council language on responsible AI use in scientific papers, adherence to Supreme Council of Universities AI Guidelines, AI governance objectives with privacy and data-protection standards, and a Faculty of Education research framework identifying AI-related ethical and legal risks.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The Faculty of Education PDF evidence is scoped to that faculty and should not be promoted as a binding university-wide AI policy without additional official confirmation.
The council news pages support strategy and recommendation claims, not a complete published AI policy code.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
